Tech Tips: FoxPro adds a new dimension to SQL

Dan Woods Reporter at The Raleigh, (N.C.) News & Observer October 1992
Data & Databases

The article provides an introduction to SQL's capabilities in FoxPro for newsroom use. With the SQL's point-and-click interface, beginners can easily construct queries without deep technical knowledge.

The article provides an introduction to SQL's capabilities in FoxPro for newsroom use. With the SQL's point-and-click interface, beginners can easily construct queries without deep technical knowledge. This interface allows users to select databases and fields visually, greatly lowering the SQL learning curve. For seasoned users, the tool automates some SQL coding tasks, making it efficient for database manipulation.

By simplifying SQL use, FoxPro encourages more reporters to engage in computer-assisted reporting, ensuring the spread of technical knowledge across newsrooms.
